amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 21 — paragraph 1 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 21 — paragraph 1 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The providers shall also inform the authorised representative, if one was appointed in accordance with Article 25, and the notified body if the high-risk AI system had to undergo a third-party conformity assessment in accordance with Article 43. Where applicable, they shall also investigate the causes in collaboration with the deployer.
parliament_text: The providers shall also inform the authorised representative, if one was appointed in accordance with Article 25, and the notified body if the high-risk AI system had to undergo a third-party conformity assessment in accordance with Article 43. Where applicable, they shall also investigate the causes in collaboration with the deployer.
